name: vscode-janitor
description: Cleans up old VS Code extension versions, cache, and logs

commands.title: VS Code Janitor: Show Disk Usage

vscodeJanitor.cleanCachedData.description: Clean CachedData — V8 bytecode cache. Zero risk: auto-regenerated on next launch.

vscodeJanitor.cleanCodeCache.description: Clean Code Cache — Chromium bytecode cache. Zero risk: auto-regenerated.

vscodeJanitor.cleanHttpCache.description: Clean HTTP Cache — network request cache. Zero risk: like clearing browser cache.

vscodeJanitor.cleanWebStorage.description: Clean WebStorage — webview asset cache (Service Worker CacheStorage). Zero risk: auto-regenerated.

vscodeJanitor.cleanGPUCaches.description: Clean GPU caches — GPUCache, DawnGraphiteCache, DawnWebGPUCache, VideoDecodeStats. Zero risk: auto-regenerated.

vscodeJanitor.cleanCrashpad.description: Clean Crashpad — crash dump files. Zero risk: diagnostic only, no app impact.

vscodeJanitor.cleanLogs.description: Clean logs — VS Code and extension host log files. Zero risk: recreated on next launch.

vscodeJanitor.cleanDuplicateExtensions.description: Remove old extension versions — keeps only the newest installed version of each extension. Zero risk.

vscodeJanitor.cleanObsoleteExtensions.description: Process .obsolete file — deletes extension folders VS Code has already marked for removal. Zero risk.

vscodeJanitor.cleanCachedExtensionVSIXs.description: ⚠️ Low risk: Clean CachedExtensionVSIXs — cached downloaded extension packages. VS Code re-downloads if needed.

vscodeJanitor.cleanNetworkCache.description: ⚠️ Low risk: Clean Network cache — minor re-initialization on next VS Code launch.

vscodeJanitor.cleanServiceWorkerCache.description: ⚠️ Low risk: Clean Service Worker cache — webview extensions re-fetch resources on next webview open.

vscodeJanitor.cleanOrphanedWorkspaceStor.description: ⚠️ Low risk: Remove orphaned workspaceStorage entries — per-workspace extension data for folders that no longer exist on disk.

vscodeJanitor.cleanHistory.description: ⚠️ Low risk: Remove old Local History entries (Timeline panel). Entries older than historyMaxAgeDays will be deleted.

vscodeJanitor.historyMaxAgeDays.description: Local History entries older than this many days will be deleted when cleanHistory is enabled.

vscodeJanitor.includeInsiders.description: Also scan and clean VS Code Insiders installation.

vscodeJanitor.portableDataPath.description: Path to a portable VS Code data folder (e.g. D:\VSCode\data). Leave empty to rely on the VSCODE_PORTABLE environment variable.

vscodeJanitor.dryRun.description: Dry run mode — reports what would be deleted without actually deleting anything.
